asset_name: Star Wars Naboo N-1 Starfighter Low Poly
author: Fighter Craft Assets
usage_notes: Low-poly Naboo N-1 Starfighter - sleek spacecraft with distinctive streamlined design. Yellow/gold accent color. Suitable for special unit or air support class in Republic forces. Game-ready topology.
special_notes: Distinctive streamlined fighter design - immediately recognizable
Yellow and chrome color scheme unique to Naboo faction
Sleek silhouette suitable for fast/mobile unit class
Can serve as special air support or tactical air unit
Moderate polycount appropriate for vehicle class
No skeleton rig - static mesh suitable for vehicle placement

steps: Click the Download button (requires free Sketchfab account)
Select GLB format (recommended for Unity import)
Save as source_download.glb in this directory
Run: dotnet run --project src/Tools/PackCompiler -- ingest assets raw/sw_naboo_starfighter_sketchfab_001

asset_manifest.json.description: This file - metadata and provenance record

discovery_notes: Discovered via Sketchfab search: 'Naboo starfighter N-1 Star Wars low poly'
Score: 8.6/10 - Excellent distinct silhouette, moderate polycount, CC-BY license
Provides specialized air support option for Republic forces
